metadata.description: Scientific concepts ontology across 5 domains for Quranic corpus analysis

concepts.name: gravitation
concepts.definition: The force of attraction between masses, fundamental to celestial mechanics

concepts.name: celestial_mechanics
concepts.definition: Physics of motion of celestial bodies under gravitational forces

concepts.name: expansion_of_universe
concepts.definition: The accelerating expansion of the universe as observed in modern cosmology

concepts.name: energy_conservation
concepts.definition: Energy cannot be created or destroyed, only transformed

concepts.name: stellar_formation
concepts.definition: Process of star formation from molecular clouds

concepts.name: photosynthesis
concepts.definition: Process by which plants convert light energy into chemical energy

concepts.name: cellular_respiration
concepts.definition: Metabolic process to convert nutrients into ATP for energy

concepts.name: dna_structure
concepts.definition: Double helix structure of deoxyribonucleic acid carrying genetic information

concepts.name: protein_synthesis
concepts.definition: Process of building proteins from amino acids using genetic code

concepts.name: embryonic_development
concepts.definition: Multi-stage process of organism development from conception to birth

concepts.name: immune_system
concepts.definition: Biological system protecting organism from infection and disease

concepts.name: cardiovascular_system
concepts.definition: System of heart and vessels transporting blood throughout the body

concepts.name: neurotransmission
concepts.definition: Chemical signaling between neurons at synapses

concepts.name: organ_transplantation
concepts.definition: Surgical transfer of organs between individuals

concepts.name: disease_pathogenesis
concepts.definition: Study of mechanisms by which disease develops in organisms

concepts.name: structural_mechanics
concepts.definition: Principles of load distribution and stress in engineered structures

concepts.name: water_management
concepts.definition: Systems for capturing, storing, and distributing water

concepts.name: irrigation_systems
concepts.definition: Techniques for artificial application of water to land

concepts.name: material_strength
concepts.definition: Properties determining resistance of materials to deformation and failure

concepts.name: hydraulic_engineering
concepts.definition: Engineering of systems using fluid flow and pressure principles

concepts.name: soil_composition
concepts.definition: Physical and chemical properties of soil affecting plant growth

concepts.name: crop_rotation
concepts.definition: Agricultural practice of planting different crops on same land sequentially

concepts.name: seed_germination
concepts.definition: Process of seed development into mature plant

concepts.name: pollination
concepts.definition: Transfer of pollen facilitating plant reproduction

concepts.name: plant_nutrition
concepts.definition: Essential nutrients and minerals required for plant growth and development

concepts.name: motion
concepts.definition: Change in position of an object with respect to time and reference frame

concepts.name: force
concepts.definition: Physical quantity that causes acceleration and changes momentum of objects

concepts.name: acceleration
concepts.definition: Rate of change of velocity with respect to time

concepts.name: momentum
concepts.definition: Product of mass and velocity, fundamental quantity in mechanics

concepts.name: work
concepts.definition: Energy transfer that occurs when force is applied over a distance

concepts.name: kinetic_energy
concepts.definition: Energy of motion, proportional to mass and velocity squared

concepts.name: potential_energy
concepts.definition: Energy stored in objects due to position or configuration

concepts.name: friction
concepts.definition: Force opposing relative motion between surfaces in contact

concepts.name: torque
concepts.definition: Rotational force that produces angular acceleration

concepts.name: angular_momentum
concepts.definition: Product of moment of inertia and angular velocity in rotational motion

concepts.name: simple_harmonic_motion
concepts.definition: Oscillatory motion where restoring force is proportional to displacement

concepts.name: wave_motion
concepts.definition: Propagation of disturbances through a medium transferring energy

concepts.name: pressure
concepts.definition: Force per unit area exerted by fluids or solids on surfaces

concepts.name: density
concepts.definition: Mass per unit volume of a substance

concepts.name: buoyancy
concepts.definition: Upward force exerted by fluids on submerged objects

concepts.name: heat
concepts.definition: Energy transfer between systems due to temperature difference

concepts.name: temperature
concepts.definition: Measure of average kinetic energy of particles in a substance

concepts.name: entropy
concepts.definition: Measure of disorder and thermodynamic irreversibility in systems

concepts.name: thermodynamic_equilibrium
concepts.definition: State where no net exchange of heat or matter occurs between system and surroundings

concepts.name: phase_transition
concepts.definition: Change between states of matter involving reorganization of molecular structure

concepts.name: latent_heat
concepts.definition: Energy absorbed or released during phase transitions at constant temperature

concepts.name: specific_heat
concepts.definition: Amount of heat needed to raise temperature of unit mass by one degree

concepts.name: thermal_expansion
concepts.definition: Increase in dimensions of materials due to temperature increase

concepts.name: thermal_conductivity
concepts.definition: Property of materials determining rate of heat transfer through conduction

concepts.name: convection
concepts.definition: Heat transfer through fluid movement due to density differences

concepts.name: radiation
concepts.definition: Heat transfer through electromagnetic waves without medium

concepts.name: black_body_radiation
concepts.definition: Electromagnetic radiation emitted by idealized absorbing objects at thermal equilibrium

concepts.name: electric_field
concepts.definition: Region of space where electric forces are exerted on charged particles

concepts.name: electric_charge
concepts.definition: Fundamental property of matter determining electromagnetic interactions

concepts.name: electric_potential
concepts.definition: Work per unit charge to move charged particle in electric field

concepts.name: electric_current
concepts.definition: Flow of electric charge through conductor measured in amperes

concepts.name: magnetic_field
concepts.definition: Region of space where magnetic forces are exerted on moving charges

concepts.name: electromagnetic_force
concepts.definition: Fundamental force causing electromagnetic interactions between charged particles

concepts.name: resistance
concepts.definition: Opposition to electric current flow in conductors

concepts.name: capacitance
concepts.definition: Ability of system to store electric charge at given potential difference

concepts.name: light
concepts.definition: Electromagnetic radiation visible to human eye with wavelengths 400-700 nm

concepts.name: electromagnetic_radiation
concepts.definition: Waves of electric and magnetic fields propagating through space

concepts.name: photon
concepts.definition: Discrete packet of electromagnetic energy or light

concepts.name: refraction
concepts.definition: Bending of light path when passing between different transparent media

concepts.name: reflection
concepts.definition: Bouncing back of light from surfaces following law of reflection

concepts.name: lens
concepts.definition: Optical device focusing or diverging light through refraction

concepts.name: polarization
concepts.definition: Restriction of electromagnetic wave oscillations to specific directions

concepts.name: frequency
concepts.definition: Number of complete oscillations or cycles per unit time

concepts.name: wavelength
concepts.definition: Distance between consecutive crests or troughs in periodic waves

concepts.name: resonance
concepts.definition: Phenomenon where systems oscillate at maximum amplitude at natural frequency

concepts.name: sound
concepts.definition: Mechanical waves of pressure variations propagating through elastic media

concepts.name: acoustic_impedance
concepts.definition: Product of medium density and sound velocity determining wave reflection

concepts.name: doppler_effect
concepts.definition: Change in wave frequency observed when source or observer is moving

concepts.name: interference
concepts.definition: Superposition of waves resulting in constructive or destructive combination

concepts.name: diffraction
concepts.definition: Bending of waves around obstacles or through openings

concepts.name: standing_wave
concepts.definition: Wave pattern where nodes and antinodes remain stationary in space

concepts.name: harmonic_oscillation
concepts.definition: Periodic motion where displacement varies sinusoidally with time

concepts.name: quantum_mechanics
concepts.definition: Fundamental theory describing behavior of matter and energy at atomic scales

concepts.name: atom
concepts.definition: Smallest unit of matter consisting of nucleus surrounded by electrons

concepts.name: electron
concepts.definition: Negatively charged elementary particle with mass 9.1×10^-31 kg

concepts.name: nucleus
concepts.definition: Dense core of atom containing protons and neutrons

concepts.name: proton
concepts.definition: Positively charged nucleon with mass 1.67×10^-27 kg

concepts.name: neutron
concepts.definition: Neutral nucleon with mass slightly greater than proton mass

concepts.name: energy_level
concepts.definition: Discrete allowed energy states for electrons in atoms

concepts.name: radioactivity
concepts.definition: Spontaneous decay of unstable nuclei emitting particles and radiation

concepts.name: alpha_decay
concepts.definition: Radioactive decay process emitting alpha particles (helium nuclei)

concepts.name: beta_decay
concepts.definition: Radioactive decay where neutron converts to proton emitting electron

concepts.name: gamma_decay
concepts.definition: Radioactive decay emitting high-energy photons from excited nuclei

concepts.name: fission
concepts.definition: Splitting of heavy nucleus into lighter nuclei releasing enormous energy

concepts.name: fusion
concepts.definition: Combination of light nuclei forming heavier nucleus releasing energy

concepts.name: relativity
concepts.definition: Theory describing gravity and motion at extreme speeds and masses

concepts.name: mass_energy_equivalence
concepts.definition: Relationship between mass and energy expressed as E=mc²

concepts.name: spacetime
concepts.definition: Four-dimensional continuum combining space and time coordinates

concepts.name: quantum_entanglement
concepts.definition: Quantum phenomenon where particles remain correlated instantaneously

concepts.name: wave_particle_duality
concepts.definition: Concept that matter and energy exhibit both wave and particle properties

concepts.name: uncertainty_principle
concepts.definition: Principle stating complementary properties cannot be simultaneously measured with arbitrary precision

concepts.name: superposition
concepts.definition: Quantum principle where systems exist in multiple states simultaneously until measured

concepts.name: string_theory
concepts.definition: Theoretical framework proposing fundamental particles are one-dimensional vibrating strings

concepts.name: dark_matter
concepts.definition: Hypothetical form of matter invisible but gravitationally affecting observable universe

concepts.name: dark_energy
concepts.definition: Mysterious form of energy causing accelerated expansion of the universe

concepts.name: nucleus
concepts.definition: Membrane-bound organelle containing genetic material and controlling cell activities

concepts.name: mitochondria
concepts.definition: Powerhouse of the cell producing ATP through oxidative phosphorylation

concepts.name: endoplasmic_reticulum
concepts.definition: Network of membranes involved in protein and lipid synthesis

concepts.name: golgi_apparatus
concepts.definition: Organelle modifying and packaging proteins for transport

concepts.name: ribosome
concepts.definition: Cellular machinery assembling proteins from amino acids

concepts.name: lysosome
concepts.definition: Organelle containing digestive enzymes for cellular breakdown

concepts.name: chloroplast
concepts.definition: Photosynthetic organelle in plant cells converting light to chemical energy

concepts.name: cell_membrane
concepts.definition: Phospholipid bilayer controlling substance transport and cell communication

concepts.name: cytoplasm
concepts.definition: Gel-like substance filling cell containing organelles and molecules

concepts.name: vacuole
concepts.definition: Storage organelle maintaining turgor pressure in plant cells

concepts.name: cell_division
concepts.definition: Process by which cells reproduce through mitosis or meiosis

concepts.name: mitosis
concepts.definition: Division producing two identical daughter cells for growth and repair

concepts.name: meiosis
concepts.definition: Reduction division producing four genetically unique sex cells

concepts.name: chromosome
concepts.definition: Structure of DNA and proteins carrying genetic information

concepts.name: telomere
concepts.definition: Repetitive DNA protecting chromosome ends from degradation

concepts.name: centromere
concepts.definition: Constricted region of chromosome where sister chromatids attach

concepts.name: centriole
concepts.definition: Cylindrical organelle organizing microtubules in cell division

concepts.name: gene_expression
concepts.definition: Process converting genetic information into functional proteins

concepts.name: transcription
concepts.definition: Process synthesizing RNA from DNA template

concepts.name: translation
concepts.definition: Process synthesizing proteins from mRNA codons

concepts.name: ribosomal_rna
concepts.definition: Structural and catalytic RNA component of ribosomes

concepts.name: messenger_rna
concepts.definition: RNA molecule carrying genetic code from DNA to ribosomes

concepts.name: transfer_rna
concepts.definition: RNA molecule delivering amino acids to ribosome during translation

concepts.name: mrna_splicing
concepts.definition: Process removing introns from pre-mRNA to create mature mRNA

concepts.name: codon
concepts.definition: Three-nucleotide sequence in mRNA specifying amino acid

concepts.name: mutation
concepts.definition: Permanent change in DNA sequence causing genetic variation

concepts.name: point_mutation
concepts.definition: Single nucleotide change in DNA sequence

concepts.name: frameshift_mutation
concepts.definition: Insertion or deletion altering reading frame of codons

concepts.name: chromosomal_aberration
concepts.definition: Large-scale change in chromosome structure or number

concepts.name: genetic_recombination
concepts.definition: Shuffling of DNA creating genetic diversity in offspring

concepts.name: crossing_over
concepts.definition: Exchange of genetic material between homologous chromosomes

concepts.name: allele
concepts.definition: Alternative form of gene at same chromosomal location

concepts.name: dominant_trait
concepts.definition: Trait expressed when at least one dominant allele present

concepts.name: recessive_trait
concepts.definition: Trait expressed only with two recessive alleles

concepts.name: organ_system
concepts.definition: Group of organs working together for specific body function

concepts.name: circulatory_system
concepts.definition: System transporting blood, oxygen, and nutrients throughout body

concepts.name: heart
concepts.definition: Muscular organ pumping blood throughout circulatory system

concepts.name: blood_vessel
concepts.definition: Vessel carrying blood: arteries, veins, or capillaries

concepts.name: blood_pressure
concepts.definition: Force exerted by blood on vessel walls

concepts.name: respiratory_system
concepts.definition: System enabling gas exchange between body and atmosphere

concepts.name: lung
concepts.definition: Organ where gas exchange occurs between air and blood

concepts.name: digestion
concepts.definition: Process breaking down food into absorbable nutrients

concepts.name: stomach
concepts.definition: Muscular organ churning food and producing digestive enzymes

concepts.name: small_intestine
concepts.definition: Primary site of nutrient absorption in digestive system

concepts.name: liver
concepts.definition: Organ detoxifying blood and producing bile for digestion

concepts.name: pancreas
concepts.definition: Gland producing digestive enzymes and insulin

concepts.name: nervous_system
concepts.definition: Network controlling body functions through neurons and signals

concepts.name: brain
concepts.definition: Central processing center of nervous system

concepts.name: spinal_cord
concepts.definition: Extension of brain transmitting signals between brain and body

concepts.name: neuron
concepts.definition: Basic functional unit of nervous system transmitting signals

concepts.name: synapse
concepts.definition: Junction between neurons where signals are transmitted

concepts.name: neurotransmitter
concepts.definition: Chemical messenger transmitting signals across synapses

concepts.name: hormone
concepts.definition: Chemical messenger regulating body processes

concepts.name: bone
concepts.definition: Rigid structure providing support and protection

concepts.name: evolution
concepts.definition: Process of gradual change in organisms over time

concepts.name: natural_selection
concepts.definition: Mechanism driving evolution through differential reproduction

concepts.name: adaptation
concepts.definition: Trait enhancing organism's fitness in specific environment

concepts.name: biodiversity
concepts.definition: Variety of species in ecosystem or on Earth

concepts.name: ecosystem
concepts.definition: Community of organisms and physical environment interacting

concepts.name: food_chain
concepts.definition: Sequence of energy transfer from producer to consumer

concepts.name: food_web
concepts.definition: Interconnected food chains in ecosystem

concepts.name: predator_prey
concepts.definition: Relationship where predator hunts prey for food

concepts.name: competition
concepts.definition: Organisms competing for limited resources

concepts.name: symbiosis
concepts.definition: Close relationship between different species

concepts.name: parasitism
concepts.definition: Relationship where parasite benefits at host's expense

concepts.name: mutualism
concepts.definition: Relationship benefiting both organisms

concepts.name: commensalism
concepts.definition: Relationship benefiting one organism without affecting other

concepts.name: speciation
concepts.definition: Process of new species formation through divergence

concepts.name: extinction
concepts.definition: Permanent loss of species from Earth

concepts.name: fertilization
concepts.definition: Union of sperm and egg forming zygote

concepts.name: zygote
concepts.definition: Single cell resulting from fertilization containing combined DNA

concepts.name: blastula
concepts.definition: Early embryonic stage of hollow ball of cells

concepts.name: gastrula
concepts.definition: Embryonic stage with three germ layers forming

concepts.name: ectoderm
concepts.definition: Outer germ layer forming nervous system and skin

concepts.name: mesoderm
concepts.definition: Middle germ layer forming muscles and skeleton

concepts.name: endoderm
concepts.definition: Inner germ layer forming digestive and respiratory organs

concepts.name: organogenesis
concepts.definition: Process of organ formation from germ layers

concepts.name: morphogenesis
concepts.definition: Developmental process shaping organism structure

concepts.name: cell_differentiation
concepts.definition: Process by which cells become specialized

concepts.name: placenta
concepts.definition: Organ exchanging nutrients and waste between mother and fetus

concepts.name: umbilical_cord
concepts.definition: Structure connecting fetus to placenta

concepts.name: amniotic_fluid
concepts.definition: Fluid surrounding and protecting fetus

concepts.name: plant_cell
concepts.definition: Eukaryotic cell with cell wall, chloroplasts, and large vacuole

concepts.name: root_system
concepts.definition: Underground structure absorbing water and nutrients

concepts.name: root_hair
concepts.definition: Extension of root epidermal cell increasing absorption surface

concepts.name: stem
concepts.definition: Support structure transporting water and nutrients in plants

concepts.name: leaf
concepts.definition: Photosynthetic organ with veins transporting fluids

concepts.name: stomata
concepts.definition: Pores in leaf surface for gas exchange

concepts.name: xylem
concepts.definition: Tissue transporting water and minerals from roots to leaves

concepts.name: phloem
concepts.definition: Tissue transporting sugars from leaves to other parts

concepts.name: plant_reproduction
concepts.definition: Asexual or sexual reproduction in plants

concepts.name: flower
concepts.definition: Reproductive structure containing male and female organs

concepts.name: pollen
concepts.definition: Male gamete of flowering plant

concepts.name: seed
concepts.definition: Mature ovule containing embryo and stored nutrients

concepts.name: germination
concepts.definition: Process of seed beginning growth
